overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Short SPCX Daily ETF (SSPC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund aims to provide 2x inverse exposure to the daily price movement of Space Exploration Technologies Corp (NASDAQ: SPCX) or SpaceX stock, less fees and expenses. SSPC was launched on Jun 15, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
